title: sophora hortensis
intro: Sophora hortensis, also known as the Sophora plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Sophora hortensis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Sophora hortensis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin problems.
